item.text: {"case_id":"EXB-D2","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Round 1 immediately brakes the requested fourth same-class branch and reframes the issue as exception-enumeration debt, offering an upstream replacement path via a unified local-part rule rather than another branch. Round 2 does not surrender to 'just add it'; it keeps the no-new-branch constraint and proposes a minimal equivalent change plus a focused test. It does not explicitly recommend a mature validation library/parser or give a replacement deadline, but behaviorally satisfies the positive brake and avoids the fail signals."}
